calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Kelly Walsh & Michelle Colombana Walsh appear in pro per. Respondents, Steven Gonzales & Amy Abscal appear in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Seidenfeld.

Parties have come to an agreement and convey such to Judge Seidenfeld.

9:12am

Matter is submitted

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Judgment Entered
